document_name: Existing Hong Kong Film Censorship Ordinance
description: The current legal text of the Hong Kong Film Censorship Ordinance, including all amendments and guidelines. This is needed to understand the regulatory environment and potential censorship risks. Intended audience: Legal Counsel, Geopolitical Risk Assessor.
steps_to_find: Search the Hong Kong government's legislative website.
Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Council.
Consult with local legal experts.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting legal experts.

document_name: Hong Kong Film Development Fund Policies and Guidelines
description: Official documentation outlining the eligibility criteria, application process, and funding guidelines for the Hong Kong Film Development Fund. This is needed to determine the project's eligibility for funding and to understand the fund's requirements. Intended audience: Financial Controller, Producer.
steps_to_find: Search the Hong Kong Film Development Council's website.
Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Council directly.
Review past funding recipients and projects.
access_difficulty: Easy: Information is likely available on the fund's website.

document_name: Hong Kong Box Office Revenue Data
description: Historical data on box office revenue for films released in Hong Kong, including genre, budget, and marketing spend. This is needed to benchmark the project's potential revenue and to inform the marketing and distribution strategy. Intended audience: Marketing & Distribution Strategist, Financial Controller.
steps_to_find: Search online databases such as Box Office Mojo and The Numbers.
Contact local film distributors and exhibitors.
Consult with industry analysts.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires accessing subscription databases or contacting industry professionals.

document_name: Hong Kong Location Filming Permit Regulations
description: Official regulations and procedures for obtaining location filming permits in Hong Kong, including requirements for traffic management, noise control, and community engagement. This is needed to plan filming logistics and to ensure compliance with local regulations. Intended audience: Location Scout & Logistics Coordinator, Production Manager.
steps_to_find: Search the Hong Kong government's website.
Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Council.
Consult with local production services companies.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting local experts.

document_name: Propaganda Films/PolyGram (Universal) Copyright Records for 'The Game'
description: Official copyright registration records for the original film 'The Game', including details of the rights holders, scope of rights, and any existing encumbrances. This is needed to determine the current rights holder and to assess the feasibility of securing remake rights. Intended audience: Rights Acquisition Specialist, Legal Counsel.
recency_requirement: Original registration and any subsequent updates
steps_to_find: Search the US Copyright Office's online database.
Contact Universal Pictures' legal department.
Consult with entertainment lawyers specializing in IP rights.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires accessing legal databases and potentially contacting major studio legal departments.

document_name: Existing Hong Kong Cultural Heritage Inventory
description: Official list of declared monuments, historic sites and buildings in Hong Kong. Needed to inform location scouting and ensure compliance with preservation regulations. Intended audience: Location Scout & Logistics Coordinator, Hong Kong Cultural Liaison.
steps_to_find: Search the Antiquities and Monuments Office website.
Contact the Hong Kong Tourism Board.
Consult with local heritage organizations.
access_difficulty: Easy: Information is likely available on the government's website.

document_name: Existing Hong Kong Labor Laws and Regulations
description: Official documentation outlining the labor laws and regulations in Hong Kong, including requirements for working hours, wages, and safety. This is needed to ensure compliance with local labor laws and to protect the rights of cast and crew. Intended audience: Production Manager, Legal Counsel.
steps_to_find: Search the Hong Kong Labour Department's website.
Consult with local labor lawyers.
Contact the Hong Kong Film Development Council.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting legal experts.

document_name: Hong Kong Film Industry Union Agreements
description: Existing collective bargaining agreements and standard contracts used within the Hong Kong film industry. Needed for talent negotiations and budgeting. Intended audience: Producer, Financial Controller.
steps_to_find: Contact the Hong Kong Performing Artistes Guild.
Contact the Hong Kong Film Directors' Guild.
Consult with local production services companies.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires contacting industry organizations and potentially paying for access.

description: Current economic indicators for Hong Kong, including GDP growth, inflation rate, and exchange rates. Needed for financial planning and risk assessment. Intended audience: Financial Controller, Project Manager.
steps_to_find: Search the Hong Kong Census and Statistics Department's website.
Consult with financial analysts.
Review reports from international financial institutions.
access_difficulty: Easy: Information is likely available on government and financial websites.
